description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof, surrounded by a well-maintained yard and several mature trees. The structure features clean, white exterior walls and large windows, allowing for ample natural light. The front of the house includes a driveway leading to a carport or garage, with a paved walkway and a small gate at the entrance. The backyard area appears to have a patio or pool, partially enclosed by fencing for privacy. The landscaping is minimalistic, with green lawns and a few shrubs complementing the trees. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped yard featuring trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and prominent trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage area, and additional trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio or pool area, and privacy fencing with dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's width, more trees, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small gate, paved walkway, and minimal overhang, framed by landscaping and trees.
